label: Emberwatch Bedchamber
description: Emberwatch Bedchamber occupies the upper story of the rowhouse, its walls of blackened brick tied with iron straps that stiffen the narrow structure against the reinforced ancient wall. A slit window toward the ruinfield is set with a hinged shutter and wire screen, mirroring Cindervale’s quarantine postings and breach-ordinances. Built-in wall cupboards and a low trunk-recess reduce clutter for muster readiness, while a charter plaque above the lintel records household obligations to watch and toll. A riveted flue chase runs along the inner wall, carrying heat and smoke control in accordance with the city’s emergency law.
